The '''Roche system''' was a [[Star system/Legends|system]] located in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]], which housed the largest settlement of [[Verpine/Legends|Verpine]]. It consisted of the [[Roche asteroid field]] orbiting the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Roche (star)|Roche]]. The Verpine rely extensively on technology to make the asteroids habitable.

==History==
After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the [[Battle of Roche (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Roche]] took place in the [[Roche asteroid field]].<ref name="SFS">''[[Strike Force: Shantipole]]''</ref> Following this debacle, Imperial starships [[Blockade of the Roche system|blockaded]] the system during most of the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Period]].<ref name="Strongholds" />

{{System-stub}}
